PassiveDesc.Name: Dimensional Sections
PassiveDesc.Desc: On a successful hit, deal 5 bonus damage at a 10% chance, with an additional separate 5% chance for each stack of Charge on self. (Multiple successful chances do not stack; Excludes Mass Attacks)

PassiveDesc.Name: Charged Barrier
PassiveDesc.Desc: When hit, take 2-3 less damage and 1-2 less Stagger damage at a 10% chance, with an additional separate 5% chance for each stack of Charge on self. (Multiple successful chances do not stack; Damage and Stagger damage rolls are done independently)

PassiveDesc.Name: Standard Pocket Battery
PassiveDesc.Desc: After spending Charge, gain 1 Charge back. (Up to 3 times per Scene)

PassiveDesc.Name: Restoration Packs
PassiveDesc.Desc: After gaining Charge, heal 1 HP for every 4 Charge owned. (Max. 5; Once per Scene)

PassiveDesc.Name: Reaction Force
PassiveDesc.Desc: If no Combat pages were used the previous Scene, gain 1 + (1 per 10 Charge) Strength and Endurance this Scene. (Max. 3; Excludes the first Scene of an Act)

PassiveDesc.Name: Tribocapacitance
PassiveDesc.Desc: When hit while Staggered, Immobilized, or at 10+ Charge, gain 1 Damage Up next Scene. (Max 5)

PassiveDesc.Name: Energized Blades
PassiveDesc.Desc: If Charge was spent the previous Scene, inflict 1 Fragile on hit this Scene. (Excludes Mass Attacks; Once per character per Scene)

PassiveDesc.Name: Refraction
PassiveDesc.Desc: On a successful hit, deal 3 bonus Stagger damage at a 10% chance, with an additional separate 5% chance for each stack of Charge on self. (Multiple successful chances do not stack; Excludes Mass Attacks)

PassiveDesc.Name: Energizing Current
PassiveDesc.Desc: If at 6+ Charge at the start of the Scene, give 1 random ally 1 Strength or 1 Endurance this Scene. (Prioritizes Rose)

PassiveDesc.Name: Quantum Leap
PassiveDesc.Desc: Gain 1 Haste next Scene at a 40% chance when either gaining or spending Charge. (Up to 2 times per Scene)

PassiveDesc.Name: Cleanup Order
PassiveDesc.Desc: When an ally that had 5+ Charge at the start of combat attacks a target with slower Speed, deal bonus damage equal to the Speed difference. (Max 4; Up to 2 times per ally per Scene)

PassiveDesc.Name: Cleanup Order
PassiveDesc.Desc: When an ally that had 5+ Charge at the start of combat attacks a target with slower Speed, deal bonus damage equal to the Speed difference. (Max 4; Up to 3 times per ally per Scene) At Emotion Level 2+, or if no other allies are present, gain +1 additional stack when gaining Charge. (Up to 2 times per Scene)
